FAQ Email

From: [You/Brand Name]

Subject:

Option #1: Questions keep coming in...

#2: Your questions answered



Body:

My/our inbox is getting bombarded about questions re: [event/product/opportunity].



So I/we figured I’d/we’d answer common questions in this email.



(By the way, you can get [product(s)/return to cart] by click here.)



[Question #1][Answer]

[Question #2][Answer]

[Question #3][Answer]



You don’t have to take my word for it though..



[Optional testimonial of client achieving desired outcome]



PLUS



[Benefit about event/product/opportunity]



Here’s the [link/button] for yah:



[link/button]



Make a wise choice friend.



[Sign off]
